description_long: This is a large, rectangular safe box with a robust, industrial appearance, featuring a heavy steel door on the front. The door is equipped with a prominent circular combination lock mechanism, reinforced hinges, and a sturdy handle, all made of metal. Scattered in front of the safe are several gold bars and coins, suggesting its use for storing valuables. The body of the safe is constructed from thick, matte black metal panels, giving it a secure and impenetrable look. The sides and back are plain, with no visible openings or features, emphasizing its focus on security. The overall design is utilitarian, prioritizing strength and protection over decorative elements.
description: A large, matte black steel safe box with a heavy front door, combination lock, and scattered gold bars and coins in front. The design is robust and utilitarian, emphasizing security.
description_view_0: Front view showing the safe's heavy door with a circular combination lock, handle, and visible gold bars and coins on the ground.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the plain, solid metal panels and a partial view of the door and gold items.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a featureless, solid back panel with no visible openings or mechanisms.
description_view_3: Right side view with plain metal panels and a partial view of the door and gold items.
attribute_handle_design: fixed horizontal bar handle on the front door, metallic
